mechanics.excerpt: WAR AND ItS MAKERS exist, hundreds of reputable mercenary units operate across known space. with more forming each day: While most new mer cenary units fold within year; those that survive virtually guaranteed employment as long as they complete tneir assign- ments professionally: Many larger mercenary commands forge close, long-term bonds with their employers such as the one the Gray Death Legion has built with the Lyran Alliance.
